description: File storage: list, search, upload, download, share, and manage Google Drive files and folders

name: drive_list_files
description: List files in Google Drive. Supports filtering by folder, type, and search query.

parent_id.description: Folder ID to list contents of (optional, uses 'root' if not specified)

max_results.description: Maximum number of files to return (default: 20)

name: drive_get_file
description: Get metadata for a specific Google Drive file.

name: drive_download
description: Download a Google Drive file to a local path.

file_id.description: Google Drive file ID to download

save_path.description: Local file path to save the downloaded file

name: drive_upload
description: Upload a local file to Google Drive.

file_path.description: Local path of the file to upload

name.description: Name for the file in Drive

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID (optional, defaults to root)

name: drive_create_folder
description: Create a new folder in Google Drive.

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID (optional, defaults to root)

name: drive_delete_file
description: Delete a file or folder from Google Drive (moves to Trash).

file_id.description: File or folder ID to delete

name: drive_rename_file
description: Rename a file or folder in Google Drive.

file_id.description: File or folder ID to rename

new_name.description: New name for the file or folder

name: drive_move_file
description: Move a file to a different folder in Google Drive.

name: drive_share_file
description: Share a Google Drive file with a specific user.

send_notification.description: Send notification email to the user (default: true)

name: drive_export
description: Export a Google Docs/Sheets/Slides file to a specific format and download it.

save_path.description: Local path to save the exported file

name: drive_get_storage_quota
description: Get the Google Drive storage quota information.

name: drive_list_shared
description: List files shared with the user in Google Drive.

max_results.description: Maximum number of files to return (default: 20)

name: drive_search
description: Search for files in Google Drive by name or content.

name: drive_copy
description: Create a copy of a Google Drive file. Optionally rename and place in a specific folder.

name.description: Name for the copy (optional, defaults to 'Copy of <original>')

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID for the copy (optional)

name: drive_permissions
description: List permissions (sharing settings) for a Google Drive file.

file_id.description: File ID to list permissions for
